holdings.infoBox: COPX is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are KGHM Polska Miedz stock at 5.52%, BHP Group at 5.33%, TECK RESOURCES LTD-CLS B at 5.29%, Hudbay Minerals at 5.26%, and Antofagasta at 5.17%.

overview.description: The Global X Copper Miners ETF (COPX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global copper mining companies. COPX was launched on Apr 19, 2010 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
data.text: Registered investment advisors did not pull back on exchange-traded funds in the first quarter of 2026. They kept adding them, according to AdvizorPro's Q1 2026 Quarterly RIA ETF Trends Report.
